title: Lightning Storm in Wilderness
immediate_steps: Descend from ridges, peaks, and elevated areas immediately
Move away from tall, isolated trees, bodies of water, and metal objects
Seek a low-lying area, dense forest of small trees, or a deep cave (stay away from the entrance)
Assume the 'Lightning Crouch': squat down on the balls of your feet, tuck your head, and cover your ears. Make yourself as small as possible while minimizing contact with the ground
avoid: Do not lie flat on the ground (ground current can travel through you)
Do not shelter under an isolated tree
Do not stay in a large group (spread out 15-50 feet apart)
